---
title: "Image Gallery"
---

Welcome to my academic and field journey. This gallery showcases my participation in research conventions, workshops, and institutional visits. Click on any image to expand.

## 🏢 Institutional Highlights

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**Ravenshaw University**<br>Department of Geography campus views](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo1.jpeg){.lightbox group="inst"}
![**Ravenshaw University**<br>Academic research environment](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo2.jpeg){.lightbox group="inst"}
![**IIT Bombay**<br>Collaborative research visit](images/IIT%20Bombay/1.jpg){.lightbox group="inst"}
![**IIT Bombay**<br>Field study discussion](images/IIT%20Bombay/2.jpg){.lightbox group="inst"}
:::

## 🎓 Research Conventions

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**ANVESHAN 2024**<br>Student Research Convention](images/Ravenshaw/1.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
![**Award Ceremony**<br>Recognizing spatial research excellence](images/Ravenshaw/2.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
:::

## 🌍 Workshops & Field Work

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**BHU GEE Workshop**<br>Banaras Hindu University training session](images/BHU/BHU4.jpg){.lightbox group="workshops"}
![**Field Data Collection**<br>Practical GIS applications](images/BHU/BHU3.jpg){.lightbox group="workshops"}
![**Ganpat University**<br>Gujarat technical workshop](images/Ganpat%20University/guni1.jpeg){.lightbox group="workshops"}
![**Technical Session**<br>GUNI research talk](images/Ganpat%20University/guni4.JPG){.lightbox group="workshops"}
:::

## 🤝 Academic Meetings

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**NAGI Congress**<br>Ranchi University conference](images/NAGI/NAGI1.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![**Cartographic Expert Group**<br>NAGI Technical session](images/NAGI/NAGI3.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
:::

## ✨ Key Engagements

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![**GDG Earth Engine Nairobi**<br>Gemini AI Presentation](images/gdg.jpg){.lightbox group="featured"}
![**Resource Person**<br>MSBD University training](images/resource2.jpg){.lightbox group="featured"}
:::
